federation.note: OSS-integration capture-multiplier #4 — a THIN adapter from granary (snarfed/granary, CC0) social-post/feed AS2 output (format=as2: FB/IG/Twitter/Mastodon/Bluesky/Nostr/Farcaster/GitHub/Flickr + RSS/Atom/JSON-Feed/mf2) to the suite's canonical chat-message model (@jeswr/solid-chat-interop), written to a Solid pod as owner-private resources. Because granary already emits AS2 — the suite's canonical chat vocabulary — the map is near-free: NO re-implemented AS2 parsing, NO hand-built RDF, NO bespoke parser. ingestGranary handles a single AS2 object OR an AS2 Collection of items; injectable authed write-fetch (unit-testable, no live server). Imported data lands OWNER-ONLY by default (never auto-shares, never writes a broadening ACL — inherits the required owner-private container). Untrusted-input hardened: every imported IRI http(s)-filtered (safeIri), every date parse-validated, a malformed/hostile object drops the bad field rather than aborting the feed. Optional fetchGranary remote helper routes a user-configured granary URL through @jeswr/guarded-fetch (https-only, block private/loopback/metadata, DNS-pin, cap+timeout, no auto-redirect). Source edits honoured on re-sync via a stable per-post slug + dct:isReplacedBy/schema:dateDeleted in the canonical model. GitHub-installable now (committed dist/, ignore-scripts=true); npm publish deferred.
